inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: The acquisition cost of the property before any rehabilitation.

inputs.label: Rehab Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total budget for renovating the property to increase its value and rentability.

inputs.label: After Repair Value (ARV)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated market value of the property after rehabilitation is complete.

inputs.label: Monthly Rent
inputs.businessContext: Gross monthly rental income expected from the property after rehab.

inputs.label: Down Payment (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of purchase price paid upfront as down payment.

inputs.label: Interest Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate on the mortgage used for purchase.

inputs.label: Loan Term (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the mortgage loan in years.

inputs.label: Monthly Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly operating expenses including taxes, insurance, management, maintenance, and vacancy allowance.
